SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Interface Visitor

All Known Implementing Classes:
DeleteExprVisitor, ExprVisitor, FromExprVisitor, GroupByExprVisitor, OrderByExprVisitor, SelectExprVisitor, SetExprVisitor, UpdateExprVisitor, WhereExprVisitor
public interface Visitor
Interface that represents a visitor.

In Criteria query, user may provide multiple criteria to fetch the required (matching) data from the underlying data store structured as one colossal graph. Each node of the graph may represent an Expr, e.g., a criteria. The nodes are connected with others by the standard join operators. While forming the final SQL query, it is essential to visit all the nodes a.k.a. expression, parse them and make them part of the final structure. Visitor design pattern helps us achieving the same.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    visit(Visitable v)
    API that should be called by the Visitable object upon accepting the request to visit.

  • Method Details

    • visit

      void visit(Visitable v)
      API that should be called by the Visitable object upon accepting the request to visit.
      Parameters:
      v - The Visitable object, that is being visited by this Visitor.
